publishedAbstract: - This is ODF 4.12.11 in stretch cluster, two nodes in one Datacenter "A" and two nodes in Datacenter "B", ceph pools with replica 4- The rook-ceph-operator is constantly crashing ~~~ rook-ceph-operator-f7b7996f6-xxxxx 0/1 Running 11 1h1m ~~~- From `oc get pod rook-ceph-operator-f7b7996f6-xxxxx-o yaml` ~~~ containerStatuses:- containerID:
